<!-- 感谢贡献！请填写以下内容。/ Thanks for contributing! Please fill this in. -->

## 说明 / Description

<!-- 这个 PR 做了什么、为什么。/ What does this PR do, and why? -->

## 关联 Issue / Related issue

<!-- 如 Closes #123 -->

## 变更类型 / Type of change

- [ ] Bug 修复 / Bug fix
- [ ] 新功能 / New feature
- [ ] 重构 / 构建 / 文档 / Refactor / build / docs

## 检查项 / Checklist

- [ ] `xcodebuild -scheme Termo -configuration Debug build` 通过 / passes
- [ ] 遵循现有代码与 UI 风格（自绘组件、注释克制）/ follows existing code & UI conventions
- [ ] 用户可见文案已本地化 / user-facing strings localized
- [ ] UI 改动附了前后截图 / screenshots attached for UI changes
